text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp with Mihono Bourbon begins. Our
goal here is to improve her abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She carefully measures the ambient temperature
and humidity, fully prepared to combat
heatstroke.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Rice Shower is also working hard at
summer camp, doing her best to motivate herself
for the upcoming Kikuka Sho.
